clientConfigFields.label: Tenant
clientConfigFields.description: The Microsoft identity platform tenant segment to use, such as common, organizations, consumers, or a specific tenant ID.

actions.name: add_table
actions.description: Create a new workbook table from an address range.

driveId.description: Optional drive ID. Leave empty to use the current user's default OneDrive.

sessionId.description: Optional workbook session ID created by create_session.

hasHeaders.description: Whether the first row of the range already contains table headers.

table.description: Workbook table returned by Microsoft Graph.

actions.name: add_table_column
actions.description: Add one column to a workbook table.

driveId.description: Optional drive ID. Leave empty to use the current user's default OneDrive.

sessionId.description: Optional workbook session ID created by create_session.

values.description: A two-dimensional matrix of cell values or cell metadata.
A two-dimensional matrix of cell values or cell metadata.

column.description: Workbook table column returned by Microsoft Graph.

actions.name: add_table_row
actions.description: Add one or more rows to a workbook table.

driveId.description: Optional drive ID. Leave empty to use the current user's default OneDrive.

sessionId.description: Optional workbook session ID created by create_session.

values.description: A two-dimensional matrix of cell values or cell metadata.

index.description: Zero-based row index inside the table.

values.description: A two-dimensional matrix of cell values or cell metadata.

row.description: Workbook table row returned by Microsoft Graph.

actions.name: add_worksheet
actions.description: Add a new worksheet to a workbook.

driveId.description: Optional drive ID. Leave empty to use the current user's default OneDrive.

sessionId.description: Optional workbook session ID created by create_session.

worksheet.description: Worksheet resource returned by Microsoft Graph.

actions.name: apply_table_filter

sessionId.description: Optional workbook session ID created by create_session.

columnId.description: Table column name or table column ID.

criteria.description: Filter criteria object accepted by Microsoft Graph table filters.

success.description: Whether the Excel operation completed successfully.

actions.name: apply_table_sort
actions.description: Apply a Microsoft Graph sort definition to one workbook table.

driveId.description: Optional drive ID. Leave empty to use the current user's default OneDrive.

sessionId.description: Optional workbook session ID created by create_session.

items.description: Sort field used by Microsoft Graph workbook sorts.

fields.description: Sort field definitions accepted by Microsoft Graph.

success.description: Whether the Excel operation completed successfully.

sessionId.description: Optional workbook session ID created by create_session.

applyTo.description: Optional clear mode accepted by Microsoft Graph.

success.description: Whether the Excel operation completed successfully.

actions.name: clear_table_filter
actions.description: Clear the current Microsoft Graph filter on one table column.

sessionId.description: Optional workbook session ID created by create_session.

columnId.description: Table column name or table column ID.

success.description: Whether the Excel operation completed successfully.

actions.description: Convert a workbook table back into a plain worksheet range.

sessionId.description: Optional workbook session ID created by create_session.

actions.name: create_session
actions.description: Create an Excel workbook session for subsequent workbook operations.

driveId.description: Optional drive ID. Leave empty to use the current user's default OneDrive.

sessionId.description: Optional workbook session ID created by create_session.

persistChanges.description: Whether workbook changes should persist after the session closes.

sessionId.description: Workbook session ID.

persistChanges.description: Whether the workbook session persists changes when closed.

actions.name: create_workbook
actions.description: Create a new .xlsx workbook file and optionally populate worksheets and data.

path.description: Workbook path including the file name, relative to the drive root and ending with .xlsx.

driveId.description: Optional drive ID. Leave empty to use the current user's default OneDrive.

drive_id.description: Optional drive ID. Leave empty to use the current user's default OneDrive.

additionalProperties.description: A two-dimensional matrix of cell values or cell metadata.

worksheetData.description: Optional mapping of worksheet names to row data.

additionalProperties.description: A two-dimensional matrix of cell values or cell metadata.

worksheetNames.description: Optional worksheet names to create in order.

webUrl.description: Web URL for the drive item.

createdDateTime.description: Creation timestamp for the drive item.

lastModifiedDateTime.description: Last modification timestamp for the drive item.

file.description: A generic JSON object returned by Microsoft Graph.

folder.description: A generic JSON object returned by Microsoft Graph.

workbook.description: A generic JSON object returned by Microsoft Graph.

parentReference.description: A generic JSON object returned by Microsoft Graph.

outputSchema.description: Drive item summary returned by Microsoft Graph.
